title: MEG-BIDS Brainstorm data sample
description: A single-subject magnetoencephalography (MEG) dataset acquired during an auditory oddball paradigm using a CTF 275 system. The dataset comprises two 6-minute acquisition runs containing 200 standard tones (440 Hz) and 40 deviant tones (554.4 Hz) presented binaurally, with the subject performing a button-press response task. Anatomical MRI data and detailed head digitization are included, making this dataset suitable for auditory evoked field analysis and as a tutorial resource for neuroimaging software development.
methods_description: MEG data were acquired at 2400 Hz using a CTF 275 system with 274 axial gradiometers, 26 reference sensors, 2 EEG electrodes (Cz, Pz), ECG, EOG, and head tracking channels. Auditory stimuli were presented binaurally via intra-aural earphones with random inter-stimulus intervals (0.7-1.7 s). Head shape and fiducial points were digitized using a Polhemus Fastrak device. Anatomical MRI was acquired on a 1.5T scanner and processed with FreeSurfer 5.3.
